name: ChatPage

states.name: Page Purpose
states.description: The Chat page is a conversational AI interface for planning and prototyping automation workflows. Users start a new chat session with Claude, have a free-form conversation to plan features, discuss architecture, brainstorm ideas, or ask questions, and then generate an executable multi-phase workflow directly from the conversation. The page has two views: a landing page (/chat) for starting new sessions, and an active session view (/chat/[id]) with a split-panel layout for chatting and previewing generated workflows side-by-side.
states.precondition: User is on an active chat session page (/chat/[id])

states.name: Landing Page Structure
states.description: Core layout elements of the Chat landing page (/chat): page header with title, runner status, and new chat button; main content area with session list or empty state
states.precondition: User is on the /chat landing page

states.name: Session Page Structure
states.description: Core layout elements of the active chat session page (/chat/[id]): header bar, chat panel (messages + input), and optional workflow preview panel
states.precondition: User has navigated to an active chat session (/chat/[id])

states.name: Chat Header Elements
states.description: Elements in the session header bar: session name (editable), session state badge, runner status, and close button
states.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

states.name: Chat Input Elements
states.description: Elements in the chat input area: message textarea, send/interrupt button, session state label, generate workflow button, and UI Bridge toggle
states.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

states.name: Message Area Elements
states.description: Elements in the chat message display area: scrollable message container, user and AI message bubbles, streaming indicator, and scroll-to-bottom button
states.precondition: User is on an active chat session page

states.name: Workflow Preview Panel Elements
states.description: Elements in the workflow preview panel: panel header with close button, workflow name/description/tags, collapsible phase sections, and action buttons (Execute, Edit, Regenerate, Save)
states.precondition: Workflow generation has been triggered (panel is open)

states.name: Landing Page State
states.description: Interactive state of landing page controls: New Chat button disabled when runner is offline, enabled when runner is connected

states.name: Chat Input State
states.description: Interactive state of chat input controls: send button enabled/disabled based on message content and session state, textarea disabled when session is closed or disconnected
states.precondition: Session is in 'ready' state and textarea is empty

states.name: Workflow Panel State
states.description: State consistency for the workflow preview panel: loading state shows spinner, error state shows alert, success state shows phases and action buttons
states.precondition: Workflow generation was triggered and is still in progress

states.name: Message Display State
states.description: State consistency for the message display area: empty state when no messages, auto-scroll behavior, streaming content display
states.precondition: Chat session is open with no messages

description: Chat page — a conversational AI interface where users plan features with Claude and generate executable workflows from natural-language discussions. Covers both the /chat landing page and /chat/[id] active session page.
